title: Build a Personal Portfolio Website
description: Build a complete personal portfolio website from scratch, adding HTML features chapter by chapter. By the end, you'll have a multi-section site with navigation, images, forms, media, and semantic structure — all using concepts from the book.
final_description: A complete portfolio website with semantic HTML5 structure, navigation bar, about section with headings and formatted text, project cards with images and links, a contact form with validation, embedded media, and accessible markup — built across 10 chapters using progressively advanced HTML concepts.
